title: About Me
name: Revan
description: Full Stack Developer and Information Technology Graduate (GPA 3.74/4.00) with hands-on experience building end-to-end web applications — from responsive frontends to robust backend systems.

I have a proven track record of delivering digital products for national-scale platforms and leading high-performing teams in tech competitions. My approach combines engineering discipline with creative problem-solving.
Committed to writing clean, maintainable code and shipping software that solves real problems. I continuously sharpen my skills across the modern web stack — React, Next.js, Node.js, and beyond.
